json.title: Global Marketing Manager
json.description: Singtel is Asia’s leading communications technology group, operating in one of the world’s fastest growing and most dynamic regions. Together with Optus and our regional associates Airtel, AIS, Globe and Telkomsel, we have a presence in 21 countries. Besides core telecom services, we provide an extensive range of digital solutions. This includes cloud, cyber security and digital advertising to enterprises as well as entertainment and mobile financial services to millions of consumers. We are seeking a dedicated and talented Global Marketing Manager for Singtel US office. This is a work from home position. As The Global Marketing Manager, The Successful Candidate Will Partner and work closely with country director, sales and regional HQ team to develop in-country marketing strategies and ensure executions to plan for enterprise customer segment (B2B). Execute marketing strategies along the customer journey with good focus on digital and social engagements. Develop Singtel US marketing plan, which includes identifying potential new/growth customer segments and alignment with Sales and business in the go-to-market strategy. Execute effective lead generation programs to develop qualified opportunities for sales team Plan and organize thought leadership events, customer events, seminars, business forums, luncheons and/or to achieve market communication. Develop and maintain actionable and addressable customer database, and market information such as competitive landscape and analysis. Provide constant feedback to management market insights. Source, train and manage 3rd party telemarketing agency to drive qualified leads Responsible for conceptualizing and executing in-country digital marketing strategies (SEO/SEM, Social Media, eDMs) to achieve targets Partner with HQ and business on content creation (digital/social/below the line) to support the marketing plan. Must Have Qualifications: Bachelor's Degree, preferably in Marketing or Business 5 years of strong hands-on experience in integrated marketing engaged via digital and social involvement B2B marketing experience Excellent communication skills both in written and spoken English Ability to work effectively across functions with different key stakeholders Sharp focus on returns of Marketing investment and attuned to business needs Strong understanding on account based marketing, social /influencer marketing Good to Have Qualifications: Marketing agency experience Asia Pacific regional experience Singtel is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religious creed, sex (including pregnancy), gender, national origin, citizenship, ancestry, age, physical or mental disability, military status, status as a veteran or disabled veteran, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital or family status, genetic information, medical condition, or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state, or local law, ordinance, or regulation. Job Type: Full-time Pay: $90,000.00 - $120,000.00 per year Benefits: 401(k) 401(k) matching Dental insurance Employee assistance program Employee discount Flexible schedule Flexible spending account Health insurance Health savings account Life insurance Paid time off Parental leave Professional development assistance Referral program Tuition reimbursement Vision insurance Schedule: Monday to Friday Supplemental Pay: Bonus pay Education: Bachelor's (Required) Experience: Marketing: 3 years (Required) Work Location: Remote
json.company_description:
Singtel Group is Asia's leading communications technology group, providing a portfolio of services from next-generation communication, digital services and digital infrastructure including regional data centre arm Nxera and regional IT services arm NCS. The Group has presence in Asia, Australia and Africa and reaches over 820 million mobile customers in 20 countries. 

Singtel is dedicated to continuous innovation, harnessing next-generation technologies to create new and exciting customer experiences as we shape a more sustainable, digital future.

json.title: Associate - Finance & Accounting (Credit Management)
json.description: An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”. Be a Part of Something BIG! To support the Credit Management team in budgeting, forecasting, reporting, and financial operations, ensuring accurate and timely financial information while maintaining compliance with internal controls and external regulations. Make An Impact By Assist in the preparation of the annual credit-related budget and financial forecasts. Support Free Cash Flow (FCF) analysis and working capital planning. Prepare and monitor monthly bad debt provisions in accordance with accounting standards. Perform general accounting functions, including journal entries, reconciliations, and month-end closing activities. Liaise with internal and external auditors, ensuring timely and accurate responses to audit requirements. Prepare regular and ad-hoc management reports and dashboards for credit performance, cashflow, and related financial metrics. Ensure compliance with internal controls, company policies, and accounting standards. Participate in continuous improvement initiatives related to finance and credit management processes. Undertake other ad-hoc tasks and projects as assigned by the Associate Director. Skills To Succeed Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy or Finance from a reputable university. 2 years of relevant experience in audit, accounting, or financial analysis (experience with Big 4 is an advantage). Sound knowledge of accounting standards (e.g., IFRS or Singapore FRS). Strong analytical, problem-solving, and numerical skills. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel; experience with ERP or financial systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle) is advantageous. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Highly organized, proactive, and capable of managing multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment. Strong team player with integrity and accountability. What We Offer A dynamic and collaborative work environment in a regional finance hub. Career growth and learning opportunities across finance and credit functions. Exposure to cross-functional projects and best practices. Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package Rewards that Go Beyond Full suite of health and wellness benefits Ongoing training and development programs Internal mobility opportunitie Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now We are committed to a safe and healthy environment for our employees & customers and will require all prospective employees to be fully vaccinated.

json.title: Lead Data Scientist- AIDA
json.description: Powering the Future with AIDA To lead the next phase of our AI evolution, we’ve launched a new business unit AIDA – Artificial Intelligence & Data Analytics – a strategic engine driving our transformation designed to scale our AI ambitions with precision and purpose.This marks a pivotal shift in how we operate, innovate, and serve to embed intelligence into every layer of our business. At Singtel , this is more than a technology upgrade. It’s a strategic transformation that redefines how value is created across the enterprise core— augmenting human capabilities and unlocking entirely new potential. It is a transformation journey by aligning people, platforms, and processes under one cohesive strategy. Our mission is to build AI literacy , and foster a culture where intelligence empowers people . We welcome you to join us on a transformational journey that’s reshaping the telecommunications industry — and redefining what’s possible with AI at its core. Grow with us in a workplace that champions innovation , embraces agility , and puts human potential at the heart of everything we do. Be a Part of Something BIG! Translating business requirements into problem statements, design and implement solutions with analytics, machine learning, or state of the art AI technologies. Explore and build advanced capabilities for strategic initiatives such as anomaly detection, predictive maintenance, planning optimization, customer experience improvement, etc Analyse, uncover, and provide analytical insights with business intelligence tools in meeting business expectations and objective. Extensive experience as a data scientist and familiar with data engineering and machine learning engineering techniques. Ability to relay insights in layman's terms, which can be then used to inform business decisions. Lead and mentor a team of junior data scientists and promote capability growth within the team. Spearhead collaborations with external partners and working within the AIDA cross functional squad to deliver strong business impact. Lead in assessing and integrating AI/ML strategies with IT or other systems for our Networks AI/ML initiatives. Architect and drive solutions the new capabilities add on to the AI/ML platform as to cater the needed for Autonomous Networks use cases that uses AI/ML solution. Make An Impact By Discover, Develop and deploy analytical projects (with or without AI & Machine Learning components) from the sizeable network data sets from Big Data Platform with Advanced Analytics tools. Develop machine learning models for predictive and prescriptive analytics (regression analysis, time series, probabilistic models, supervised classification, unsupervised learning, etc) Lead and monitor the performance of Junior Data Scientists and providing them with practical guidance, solution validation and implementation. Develop and deploy insight visualisation dashboards, analytics reports, Generative AI based information aggregations and conduct presentation to update to senior management on the outcome of the analytics/ML projects Train, build, validate, test, improve and fine-tune the models and algorithms. Selecting and employing advanced statistical procedures to obtain actionable insights. Build, maintain and improve the data cube model derived from telco datasets. Continuously optimize and explore the new technology through R&D and trial/PoC. Drive ML use cases within Networks domain and explore new use case and business opportunities such as 5G Use Cases, Anomalies detection. Responsible to review internal or external proposal such as vendor’s solution design to ensure technology appropriateness, solution efficacy and standards compliance related to analytic and, AI/ML solution. Collaborate with different stakeholders from business, technical, project management and operation to design and implement the solution. Capable in work with Waterfall or Agile project team. Adopt and implement the industry standards and best practice of analytics project methodologies such as CRISP-DM for data mining, or similar. Mentor and coach junior and mid-level data scientists to foster skills development and career progression within the team. Lead cross-functional analytics initiatives and drive alignment across business units to ensure the strategic application of data science. Evaluate and select advanced tools, frameworks, and methodologies to improve model accuracy, scalability, and deployment efficiency. Serve as a subject matter expert (SME) in AI/ML within the organization and represent the team in technical forums, external collaborations, and industry events. Proactively identify high-impact opportunities where AI/ML can deliver business value, and lead the design of innovative, data-driven solutions. Lead technical reviews and post-implementation assessments to measure project impact and identify continuous improvement areas. Skills For Success Bachelor or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Math, Data Analytics, Data Science/Artificial Intelligence or Machine Learning with at least 5 years of hands-on development experience Hands on experience in analytics project and AI/ML model developments and deployment. Experience in handling large volume of datasets. Competent in machine learning principles and techniques. Analytical methods: statistical modeling (e.g. linear regression, time series), supervised machine learning (e.g., random forests, neural networks), design of experiments, segmentation/ clustering, text mining, NLP. Proficiency in Python, PySpark and analytics skillsets. Experience in programming, shell script and UNIX commands. EDA in using Jupyter or Zeppelin Notebook. Good interpersonal skills Highly self-driven, demonstrate critical thinking, team player & fast learner Outstanding supervision and mentorship abilities. Good technical writing skills Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities? Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!

json.title: Director Senior Director, Technology & Digitalization, Global Business Services
json.description: An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”. Be a Part of Something BIG! This role leads the technology and digitalisation agenda for Singtel’s Global Business Services (GBS) unit, driving technology enablement, process transformation, and digital innovation across different functions and services. The incumbent will work closely with GBS leadership and customers to deliver excellent user experience and productivity improvement through standardisation and digitalisation and the adoption of cost-effective technologies that enhance service delivery. Make An Impact Technology Enablement and Onboarding Lead technology enablement initiatives to transform GBS into a highly digital operation that is scalable to serve companies and associates within the Singtel Group. Collaborate with Corporate units like IT, Finance as well as operating companies to ensure seamless integration of business support systems and services for GBS work. Ensure alignment with Singtel’s enterprise architecture and security standards. Process Transformation and Digitalisation Identify opportunities for automation, simplification, and digitalisation of work processes. Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency and service quality. Champion the use of appropriate advanced technologies to ensure that GBS stay relevant and operate efficiently. Technology Strategy and Governance Develop and maintain a technological roadmap aligned with GBS and Singtel Group objectives. Establish governance frameworks to ensure compliance, scalability, and sustainability of digital initiatives. Monitor KPIs and SLAs to track the impact of digitalisation efforts on service delivery. Stakeholder Engagement and Change Management Engage with internal stakeholders across Finance, IT, Procurement, HR and other Corporate functions align digital strategies. Lead change management efforts to support adoption of new technologies and processes. Provide regular updates to senior leadership on progress, risks, and opportunities of transformation and digitalisation initiatives. Talent and Capability Development Build and lead a high-performing team with expertise in business transformation, digitalisation and IT operations. Support upskilling initiatives to develop internal capabilities in emerging technologies Skills For Success Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Accounting, IT, or Engineering At least 15 years of experience in shared services, operations, or corporate services with leadership responsibilities with a large corporation. Minimum of 7 years in management role with a proven track record of leading large system implementation or complex transformation projects involving multi-functional stakeholders or across different geographies Experience working in a matrixed operating model with exposure to stakeholder management across geographies and business units. Strong understanding of technology and applications for enterprise-wide deployment. Fully conversant on emerging trends and technologies and how these can be applied to transform end-to-end workflows or processes Strong financial and commercial acumen, with experience in cost management, budgeting, and business case development. Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and leadership skills. Strong people leadership and talent development capabilities, with a track record of building high performing, engaged teams. Cultural sensitivity and adaptability to operate effectively in a diverse, cross-border environment. Strategic mindset with operational discipline - able to balance day-to-day delivery with long-term transformation goals.

json.title: Senior manager - Group Internal Audit, Technology
json.description: An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”. Be a Part of Something BIG! The Senior Manager, Group Internal Audit – Technology is a senior specialist role within Singtel Group Internal Audit, reporting directly to the Audit director, and is responsible for providing independent, objective, and risk-based assurance over Singtel’s technology, cybersecurity, and digital environments. The Senior Manager leads and delivers complex technology and cybersecurity audits, engagement s , oversee ing audit planning , execution and reporting , and providing robust and evidence-based challenge to key stakeholders. The role contributes to the development of the technology audit plan and ensures audit outcomes are high quality, actionable, and support effective risk management and control improvement . Audit outputs contribute directly to management assurance, Audit Committee reporting, and regulatory disclosures. Group Internal Audit operates as a key pillar of Singtel’s corporate governance framework and reports functionally to the Singtel Group Audit Committee. Make an Impact by Lead end-to-end delivery of complex, risk-based technology and cybersecurity audits across Singtel Group. Develop Audit Planning Memorandums (APMs), defining audit objectives, scope, risks, and audit approach. Design and implement audit programs and procedures aligned to Group Internal Audit methodology and professional standards. Assess the design and operating effectiveness of IT general controls, application controls, cybersecurity controls, and technology governance frameworks. Evaluate major technology initiatives and systems under development to ensure appropriate governance, controls, documentation, and security-by-design. Provide independent assurance over cybersecurity risk management, including protection of networks, cloud environments, systems, and sensitive data. Assess compliance with relevant laws, regulations, industry standards, and Singtel policies (e.g. data protection, cybersecurity, technology risk). Identify emerging technology risks and assess Singtel’s control maturity and risk posture. Perform control advisory reviews for significant in-flight programs and strategic initiatives where required. Identify root causes of control deficiencies and develop practical, commercially grounded recommendations. Prepare high-quality audit reports with minimal supervision and ensure alignment and agreement of findings with senior management. Lead audit kick-off and closing meetings with senior executives, ensuring clear communication of objectives, scope, findings, and risk implications. Provide clear, credible challenge to senior stakeholders while maintaining strong professional relationships and audit independence. Escalate significant or high-risk matters to the Audit Director and support Audit Committee reporting. Coach, train, and review the work of less experienced auditors, embedding audit methodology, quality standards, and professional judgement. Provide technical leadership in technology and cybersecurity auditing across the function. Contribute to the development and continuous improvement of technology audit methodology, tools, and practices. Oversee tracking and validation of management action plans and perform follow-up reviews to ensure timely and effective remediation. Support annual audit planning, resource management, and prioritisation of technology audit coverage. Contribute to ad-hoc assignments, investigations, and Audit Committee-related matters as required. Stay current on emerging technology, cybersecurity threats, and industry developments, applying insights to strengthen audit coverage and impact. Skills For Success Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related discipline. Professional certification such as CISA, CISSP, CISM, or CIA. Extensive experience in technology audit, IT risk, cybersecurity, or internal audit, preferably within large, complex organisations. Strong understanding of telecommunications, digital platforms, and large-scale technology environments. Hands-on experience auditing cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern architectures. Proven ability to lead complex audits and engage credibly with senior management. Excellent analytical, report writing, and influencing skills. Rewards that Go Beyond Flexible work arrangements Full suite of health and wellness benefits Ongoing training and development programs Internal mobility opportunities Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities? Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!

json.title: Senior Lead Architect, AI ML
json.description: At Singtel, we believe in the strength of a vibrant, diverse and inclusive workforce where backgrounds, perspectives and life experiences of our people help us innovate and create strong connections with our customers. We strive to ensure all our people practices are non-discriminatory and provide a fair, performance-based work culture that is diverse, inclusive and collaborative. Join us and experience what it’s like to be with an Employer of Choice*. Together, let’s create a brighter digital future for all. *Awarded at the HR Fest Awards 2020. Be a Part of Something BIG! Group Technology has a strategic intent to develop the next generation of intelligent, autonomous networks leveraging AI/ML at scale. AI/ML is expected to be foundational in transforming Service Planning, Service Assurance, and Network Operations into predictive, self-optimizing, and self-healing systems. As a Senior Lead Architect, the role extends beyond strategy definition into enterprise-wide, regional-wide leadership, governance, and execution oversight. The position holder is accountable for defining, institutionalising, and scaling AI/ML architecture, platforms, and operating models across Singtel Group and Opcos. This includes driving measurable business outcomes, embedding AI-first principles, and enabling long-term competitive advantage aligned with the Singtel28 strategic vision and beyond. The role reports to the Senior Director - Group Strategy, Engineering, and Innovation (GSEI)/Network Services Development (NSD), and serves as a key advisor to senior leadership, influencing investment priorities, technology directions, and transformation initiatives across Group Networks. Enterprise AI/ML Strategy, Governance, and Execution This role is a senior technical authority responsible for shaping and governing AI/ML strategy across Group Networks. The position holder will lead large-scale transformation programs, ensuring alignment across Opcos, and driving adoption of standardized architectures, platforms, and best practices. The role requires deep expertise in AI/ML technologies, strong business acumen, and the ability to influence stakeholders at executive levels while ensuring delivery excellence. AI/ML Strategy & Enterprise Architecture Leadership Define and own the end-to-end AI/ML strategy, reference architecture, and multi-year roadmap for Group Networks. Establish enterprise-wide AI/ML architectural standards, frameworks, and governance models. Drive evolution from siloed automation initiatives to unified, AI-native network operations. Align AI/ML strategy with Autonomous Network (AN) strategy, KPIs, value pool outcomes, and transformation objectives. Act as the ultimate design authority for AI/ML architecture decisions across domains. Executive Leadership & Stakeholder Influence Serve as a trusted advisor to senior executives across Group Technology and Opcos. Influence investment decisions, technology directions, vendor strategies, and ecosystem partnerships. Lead cross-Opco alignment to ensure consistency in AI/ML adoption and execution. Represent Singtel in industry forums, partnerships, and strategic collaborations. Technical Direction, Innovation & Platform Lead the design and adoption of scalable AI/ML platforms, including Agentic, GenAI and advanced analytics ecosystems. Drive platform-based approaches (AI platforms, MLOps platforms, data platforms) to enable reuse and scalability. Champion innovation in areas such as autonomous networks, AI agents, and cognitive operations. Evaluate and integrate emerging technologies to maintain technological leadership. AI/ML Delivery Oversight & Value Realisation Oversee execution of AI/ML programs across Opcos and domains (RAN, Core, Transport, OSS, etc.). Ensure delivery of measurable outcomes such as cost optimisation, performance improvement, and customer experience enhancement. Establish KPIs, metrics, and governance mechanisms to track value realization. Data & AI Platform Strategy Align enterprise data strategy to support AI/ML at scale, including data architecture, governance, and lifecycle management. Define appropriate standard data models and ontologies (based on TM Forum and other standardisation bodies) in support of AI/ML development Drive adoption of unified data standards, ensuring interoperability across Opcos. Thought Leadership & Industry Positioning Provide forward-looking insights on AI/ML trends and their impact on telecom networks. Publish whitepapers, contribute to standards bodies, and represent Singtel externally. Establish Singtel as a leader in AI-driven network transformation. Expertise In AI/ML Technologies And Practices Advanced knowledge of Generative AI (GenAI), including LLMs, SLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, AI agents, and copilots. Deep understanding of ML paradigms: supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning, symbolic AI, and neural AI. Strong experience with AI/MLOps, including lifecycle management, CI/CD, observability, governance, and scaling. Familiarity with distributed AI systems, cloud-native architectures, and edge AI deployments. Data And Analytics Expertise Enterprise data architecture, including data lakes, lakehouses, and real-time data platforms. Data engineering: feature engineering, EDA, pipeline design, and optimization. Data governance: policies, compliance, security, and quality frameworks. Data exposure: APIs, streaming (Kafka), and modern storage (SQL, NoSQL, vector databases). Other Roles And Responsibilities Drive cross-functional transformation across Networks, IT, and Business Units. Lead vendor and partner ecosystem strategy for AI/ML solutions. Ensure alignment between technology innovation and operational excellence. Skills For Success Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field. Advanced degrees preferred. 10–15+ years of experience in AI/ML, data, or software engineering. Proven track record of leading large-scale, enterprise-wide AI/ML transformations. Experience operating at senior leadership or enterprise architect level. Strong experience in telecom/network domains preferred. Strong strategic thinking with ability to translate vision into execution. Exceptional leadership, stakeholder management, and influencing skills. Deep technical expertise combined with business and financial acumen. Excellent communication skills, including executive-level presentations. Strong problem-solving and decision-making capabilities. Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities? Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!

json.title: Retail Executive
json.description: At Singtel, we believe in the strength of a vibrant, diverse and inclusive workforce where backgrounds, perspectives and life experiences of our people help us innovate and create strong connections with our customers. We strive to ensure all our people practices are non-discriminatory and provide a fair, performance-based work culture that is diverse, inclusive and collaborative. Join us and experience what it’s like to be with an Employer of Choice*. Together, let’s create a brighter digital future for all. *Awarded at the HR Fest Awards 2020. Be a Part of Something BIG! Across Singapore, our Singtel retail stores are looking for passionate and driven Retail Executives who create strong connections with our customers to discover how our products and services can empower them in this technology-driven world. As a Retail Executive, you are an ambassador and the face of Singtel. Make an Impact by Drives sales through active engagement of customers, sharing product knowledge, explains and demonstrates the different functions and features of the products Discover customers’ needs and introduce different price plans and/or value-added services accordingly Stay on top of the latest updates or developments on products, features or marketing/sales initiatives Provide an excellent customer journey and experience for all customers Skills For Success Min N/O/A Level Learning new things easily and adapt to changing technologies Thrive in discovering customers’ needs, and delivering the best customer experience Perform well in a target-driven environment and are motivated against personal and sales targets Excel in working within a team and can work independently Comfortable with working retail store hours, including weekend and public holidays Rewards that Go Beyond Ongoing training, mentoring and development opportunities Comprehensive staff benefits and exclusive discount Year-end sales awards for the top performer Internal mobility opportunities Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now! We are committed to a safe and healthy environment for our employees & customers and will require all prospective employees to be fully vaccinated.

The Group has presence in Asia, Australia and Africa and reaches over 820 million mobile customers in 20 countries. 

Singtel is dedicated to continuous innovation, harnessing next-generation technologies to create new and exciting customer experiences as we shape a more sustainable, digital future.

json.title: Product Manager
json.description: At Singtel, we believe in the strength of a vibrant, diverse and inclusive workforce where backgrounds, perspectives and life experiences of our people help us innovate and create strong connections with our customers. We strive to ensure all our people practices are non-discriminatory and provide a fair, performance-based work culture that is diverse, inclusive and collaborative. Join us and experience what it’s like to be with an Employer of Choice*. Together, let’s create a brighter digital future for all. *Awarded at the HR Fest Awards 2020. Make An Impact By Manage the product and corresponding lifecycle of Singtel’s Managed Services portfolio including SD-WAN and SSE solutions. Manage the product’s cost structure, roadmap, product positioning, commercial model, and product P&L. Strengthening the competitiveness of Singtel SD-WAN by enabling both Singtel-led AI initiatives and curating relevant principal-led AI programs for integration into the portfolio. Improving the efficiency, scalability, and operational resilience of the end-to-end SD-WAN service by driving automation and embedding AI-Ops into day-to-day business operations. Develop product policies, performance and streamline processes within Singtel. Ensure comprehensive documentation of processes and product specification. Plan and develop new product, creating features, capabilities, establishing pricing and benchmarking to ensure product’s relevance, competitiveness, and meeting market needs. Work closely with relevant stakeholders to ensure product requirements are well supported and integrated into OSS and BSS systems. Work closely with key vendors to capitalize on new opportunities, smoothen our Day 1 deployment and Day 2 operations for current customers. Enable Singtel’s sales team to upsell services to accelerate customers’ digital transformation. Support sales in RFP, RFQ and service teams during deployment (Day 1) and service management (Day 2) phases. Review and manage product terms and conditions, partner contract and agreement. Skills For Success Degree in Business, Marketing, Computer Science or Engineering. Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in product management, product development experience or related scope, at large enterprises, or innovative start-ups. Experience in managed Customer Premise Equipment (CPE), cloud-based services and/or customized managed services offering. Experience in working with major SDWAN / router / SSE brands such as Fortinet, Cisco, Silverpeak, Versa, Cato, Palo Alto, Z-Scaler and providing Managed Services globally is not a requirement but will be advantageous. Interest in developing service and initiatives that improve end-user experience through runbooks, digitalization, automation, AI-Ops. Keen sense of technology developments, market trends, and needs of the enterprise business market. Strong numerical, analytical, and problem-solving skills. Good written and verbal communications skills. Are you ready to say hello to BIG Possibilities? Take the leap with Singtel to unlock new opportunities and accelerate your growth. Apply now and start your empowering career!

json.title: Lead Software Engineer (Java Microservices, BSS CPQ)
json.description: An empowering career at Singtel begins with a Hello. Our purpose, to Empower Every Generation, connects people to the possibilities they need to excel. Every "hello" at Singtel opens doors to new initiatives, growth, and BIG possibilities that takes your career to new heights. So, when you say hello to us, you are really empowered to say…“Hello BIG Possibilities”. Be a part of something BIG! Say HELLO to BIG Possibilities with Singtel KL (Sudong MY Sdn Bhd)! Singtel is Asia's leading communications technology group, our presence spans across 21 countries in Asia, Australia, and Africa. We thrive on innovation, digital transformation, and harnessing next-generation technology to create a more sustainable and digital future. Now, we are bringing this energy to Kuala Lumpur with the launch of our brand-new Shared Services Centre! The Lead Software Engineer plays a critical role in designing and delivering scalable, high-quality solutions across Singtel’s NewCore platform. This role combines strong technical leadership with hands-on development across BSS domains such as CRM, Product Catalogue, Order Management and CPQ. Make An Impact By Design end-to-end technical solutions across front-end and back-end systems aligned to business and architecture requirements Lead and drive solution design across BSS domains including CRM, CPQ, Order Management and Billing integration Own the development of scalable microservices architectures and reusable system components Develop and maintain APIs, services and integration layers across distributed systems Drive implementation of product modelling, pricing configuration and order orchestration flows Ensure alignment with enterprise architecture standards including performance, scalability and security Provide technical leadership, mentorship and guidance to engineering teams while remaining hands-on in development Skills For Success Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related field 6 to 10 years of experience in enterprise system development, preferably in BSS/OSS environments Strong proficiency in programming languages such as Java, Go, Python or TypeScript Solid experience in microservices architecture, REST APIs and distributed systems Strong knowledge of relational databases such as Oracle, MySQL or PostgreSQL Experience with Linux environments and version control tools such as Git Hands-on experience with zSmart BSS, zSmart CPQ or similar platforms is highly preferred Experience in event-driven architecture such as Kafka or messaging systems Strong communication skills, leadership mindset and ability to work in a fast-paced environment Good To Have Exposure to AI-driven pricing or recommendation engines Knowledge of TM Forum standards Experience with cloud platforms and Kubernetes Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now!
